name: Waldorf Red Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Red food coloring (4 little teaspoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening, sugar, and eggs until fluffy.
2. Make a paste with cocoa and red food coloring; add to the shortening mixture.
3. Add salt to the sifted flour and sift again.
4. Add flour alternately with buttermilk. Add vanilla. Mix vinegar and baking soda last. Blend at a low speed, do not beat hard.
5. Bake in 2 greased and floured 9-inch cake pans for 30 minutes at 350°F.
6. Prepare the icing by cooking flour and milk until thick. Cool.
7. Cream sugar, butter, and vanilla until light and fluffy. Add the flour mixture, blending on low speed.
8. Frost the cooled cake.
